CreateEmailRequest.description: Request body for creating an email. appData must include at least one of: folderId, workspaceId, or programId.
CreateEmailRequest.title: CreateEmailRequest

CreateEmailTemplateRequest.description: Request body for creating an email template. appData must include at least one of: folderId or workspaceId.
CreateEmailTemplateRequest.title: CreateEmailTemplateRequest

CreateFragmentRequest.description: Request body for creating a fragment. appData must include at least one of: folderId or workspaceId. settings must include fragmentType and supportedChannels.
CreateFragmentRequest.title: CreateFragmentRequest

UpdateEmailRequest.description: Request body for updating an email. appData may include at least one of: folderId, workspaceId, or programId.
UpdateEmailRequest.title: UpdateEmailRequest

UpdateEmailTemplateRequest.description: Request body for updating an email template. appData may include at least one of: folderId or workspaceId.
UpdateEmailTemplateRequest.title: UpdateEmailTemplateRequest

UpdateFragmentRequest.description: Request body for updating a fragment. appData may include at least one of: folderId or workspaceId. settings may include fragmentType and supportedChannels.
UpdateFragmentRequest.title: UpdateFragmentRequest
